name: io.github.codespar/mcp-shopify
description: MCP server for Shopify — global ecommerce platform Admin REST API (orders, products, customers, inventory, fulfillments, webhooks)

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Shopify Admin API access token (private/custom app) sent as X-Shopify-Access-Token header

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Shopify Admin API version. Defaults to 2024-01.
